title: RGSSH Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Senior Resident Posts
description: The Rajiv Gandhi Super Speciality Hospital (RGSSH) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancy for 01 Senior Resident Post. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, DNB, MD/MS, PGDM, or post-graduation can apply for the RGSSH Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can attend the walk- in interview.
